subject: Mathematics
statement: Recall multiplication and division facts for multiplication tables up to 12 x 12.
misconceptions: Confuses nearby multiplication facts such as 6 x 8 and 7 x 8.
Counts every fact from the beginning instead of using known facts.
Does not connect division facts to multiplication facts.
parent_explanation: Can recall mixed multiplication and division facts with increasing fluency.
teacher_evidence: Accuracy, speed, mixed recall, retention and reduced hint use.

subject: Mathematics
statement: Find the area of rectilinear shapes by counting squares.
misconceptions: Reads rectangle dimensions in the wrong order but does not understand why multiplication still works.
parent_explanation: Can find the space inside a rectangle or rectilinear shape by counting or using rows and columns.
teacher_evidence: Can model area with squares, explain rows and columns, and avoid perimeter confusion.
